compliance.stopConfirmation: Mwalekele ukulandwa kwa ma-message ya marketing ya Vergeo5. Ama-update ya order yakonka kuluma ukutumwa.
compliance.startConfirmation: Mwalipokele ukulandwa kwa ma-update ya Vergeo5. Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

order_confirmed.body: Order yenu ya Vergeo5 {order_reference} yasuminishwa. Total {total}. Tebula: {track_url} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

payment_received.trust_narrative: K{amount} yenu yikwata bwino na Vergeo5 mpaka kufika kwa katundu.

order_shipped.body: Order yenu {order_reference} yatumizwa. {tracking_info} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

order_ready_pickup.body: Order yenu {order_reference} yikwete kale. {pickup_details} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

order_delivered.body: Order yenu {order_reference} yafika. Lemeni ifiwayo: {review_url} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

vendor_new_order.body: Order yambi {order_reference} pa Vergeo5: {product_title} × {quantity}. Tukishisheni mu vendor app.

otp_login.body: Code yenu ya kulowa mu Vergeo5 ni {otp_code}. Ilekefwa mu miniti 10. Musosele code iyi.

event_cancelled.body: Event ya Vergeo5 "{event_title}" pa {event_date} yacancelwa. {refund_detail} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.
event_cancelled.refund_pending: Refund ya malipilo yenu ileprocesswa na Vergeo5.
event_cancelled.refund_none: Takwaba malipilo yasangwa pa account yenu pa event iyi.

event_schedule_changed.body: Amashiwi ya event ya Vergeo5 "{event_title}" yaluka. Usiku: {event_date}. Venue: {venue}. Loleni tickets shenu mu app. Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

otp_login.body: Vergeo5 code: {otp_code}. Ilekefwa mu miniti 10. Musosele.

review_request.body: Order yenu {order_reference} pa Vergeo5 yalingile shani? Lemeni review: {review_url} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

abandoned_cart_recovery.body: Mwabashe ifintu mu cart yenu ya Vergeo5. Malisheni checkout: {checkout_url} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

kyc_nudge.body: Ukusuminishwa kwa vendor wa Vergeo5 kuli ukulindilila. Malisheni mu vendor app pakuti mwatampe ukuteka.

low_stock_alert.body: Vergeo5: {title} yali na stock nshikulu ({stock_qty} yasala). Ongezeni stock mu vendor app.

payout_failure_alert.body: Vergeo5 payout yafilwa: {vendor_name} {amount} ref {lenco_reference}. Onani mu admin.

event_schedule_changed.body: Vergeo5: "{event_title}" details yasinthidwa. Usiku: {event_date}. Venue: {venue}. Loleni mu app.

receipt.subject: Receipt yenu ya Vergeo5 — order {order_id}
receipt.body:
Mwalishipa sana pa malipilo yenu.

Order: {order_id}

Indalama: K{amount}

Indalama yikwata bwino na Vergeo5 mpaka kufika kwa katundu.

approved.subject: Ukusuminishwa kwa vendor wa Vergeo5 kwasuminishwa
approved.body:
Amashiwi ayasuma — ukusuminishwa kwa ndimi nshya ya vendor kwasuminishwa.

Mwashobola ukwala ifintu fyonse no kulandwa kwa payout pa Vergeo5.

rejected.subject: Ukusuminishwa kwa vendor wa Vergeo5 kufuna ukusuminishwa
rejected.body:
Tetwalisuminisha ukusuminishwa kwa vendor.

Imfumu: {reason}

Mubombeni doculents ukufuma mu vendor app.

review_request.body: Order yenu {order_reference} ya Vergeo5 ukufuma kwa {vendor_name} yalingile shani? Lemeni review: {review_url} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

abandoned_cart_recovery.body: Mukwete ifintu mu cart yenu ya Vergeo5. Tubombeni pali pa mwalekele: {checkout_url} Lemeni STOP ukuleka.

kyc_nudge.body: Application yenu ya vendor ya Vergeo5 yalindile pa awa 48. Malisheni ukusuminishwa pakuti mwatampe ukuteka.

low_stock_alert.body: Stock nshikulu pa Vergeo5: {title} yasala {stock_qty} (threshold {threshold}). Update stock mu vendor app.

payout_failure_alert.body: Warning ya payout failure: {vendor_name} — {amount} (ref {lenco_reference}). Onani mu admin.
